title: [Bug]: Incompatible result with MySQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), value DOUBLE, data VARCHAR(1000), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name, value, data) VALUES (1, 'item1', 10.5, '{"field": "data1"}'), (2, 'item2', NULL, '{"field": "data2"}'), (3, 'item3', -5.0, NULL);
SELECT id, SUBSTR(data, INSTR(data, '"field": "') + 11, INSTR(data, '"', INSTR(data, '"field": "') + 11) - (INSTR(data, '"field": "') + 11)) AS field_value FROM t2 WHERE value IS NULL OR value < 0;

SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE SUBSTR(data, INSTR(data, '"field": "') + 11, INSTR(data, '"', INSTR(data, '"field": "') + 11) - (INSTR(data, '"field": "') + 11)) = 'data1' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' DAY;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent JSON handling in query conditions
